metadata.objective: Comprehensive optimization of all projects, channels, and workflows

stories.title: Audit and Document All MCP Servers
stories.description: Create a comprehensive inventory of all MCP servers (Apollo, Upwork, Canva, etc.) with their publish status, version, and health check results
acceptance_criteria: MCP inventory document created at docs/MCP-INVENTORY.md
Each MCP has: name, version, PyPI status, Registry status, health check
Any unpublished MCPs identified for future work

stories.title: Lead Scraper Code Optimization
stories.description: Review and optimize lead-scraper project: remove dead code, consolidate duplicate functions, improve error handling

stories.title: Social Media Automation Health Check
stories.description: Verify social media posting channels (X/Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram) are working and document any issues

stories.title: Clawdbot Memory Integration Fix
stories.description: Investigate and document the Ollama integration needed for Clawdbot memory (currently blocked by OpenAI embedding quota)

stories.title: Personal Assistant Digest Enhancement
stories.description: Enhance the morning digest system to include Upwork job alerts and campaign analytics summary
acceptance_criteria: Upwork job alerts integrated into digest

stories.title: Apollo Pipeline Metrics Dashboard
stories.description: Create a simple metrics dashboard for Apollo pipeline showing credit usage, conversion rates, and ROI

stories.title: Upwork Job Monitoring Automation
stories.description: Create automated job monitoring that searches Upwork for relevant Amazon FBA jobs and notifies via digest
acceptance_criteria: Job search function created using Upwork MCP

stories.title: Documentation Consolidation
stories.description: Consolidate scattered documentation, update outdated docs, and create cross-reference index

stories.title: Execution Folder Quick Cleanup
stories.description: Quick cleanup of execution/ folder: remove obvious dead code, add missing docstrings to key files

stories.title: Go-Tracker Status Check
stories.description: Review Go-Tracker project status, document current state, and identify next steps

stories.title: AI Customer Service Voice API Review
stories.description: Review ai-customer-service project, verify Twilio webhook configuration, document current capabilities

stories.title: Generate Comprehensive Optimization Report
stories.description: Generate final report summarizing all optimizations, issues found, and recommendations
